description: Fix review issues #3 and #4: correct governance thresholds and file references in Identity Governance Implementation Memo
steps: Update Virtual_SIA_Identity_Governance_Implementation_Memo_AR.md section ID4 to use correct thresholds: continue (drift < 0.5), review_decision (0.5 <= drift <= 0.7), halt_and_review (drift > 0.7)
Update Virtual_SIA_Identity_Governance_Implementation_Memo_AR.md sections ID2, ID3, ID4 to reference correct file paths: drift_detector.py, commitment_ledger.py, governance.py instead of service.py
acceptance_criteria: Memo thresholds match code: continue < 0.5, review_decision 0.5-0.7, halt_and_review > 0.7
Memo file references match actual files: drift_detector.py, commitment_ledger.py, governance.py
findings: Fixed both review issues #3 and #4. Thresholds updated to match code (0.5/0.7). File references corrected to drift_detector.py, commitment_ledger.py, governance.py. All 285 tests pass.
